summary.title: TicTacDoh Threat Model
summary.description: A local Python Tic Tac Toe game using tkinter GUI, SQLite database for user authentication and game history, and JSON files for saved game states.

threats.title: MD5 is cryptographically broken, no salt used
threats.description: The _hash_password function uses MD5 hashing with no salt. MD5 is cryptographically broken and vulnerable to rainbow table attacks. Identical passwords produce identical hashes, making it trivial to identify users sharing the same password.
threats.mitigation: Replace MD5 with bcrypt or Argon2 with a unique salt per user.
